description: The weaning date cannot be in the future.
conditions: aplicado somente quando date estiver definido

description: Weaning date must be after or equal to the last animal event.
conditions: aplicado somente quando date estiver definido
se o último evento do animal for o próprio desmame, compara com o penúltimo evento ou a data de entrada

description: The average age of the piglets must be within the farm-configured range.
conditions: aplicado somente quando average_off_age estiver definido
validado contra os threshold_references configurados na granja (event_set: animal_weaning, type: average_off_age)

description: Quantity of weaned piglets must not exceed the total piglets available from the nursing sow.
conditions: aplicado somente quando quantity estiver definido
ignorado se total_piglets não estiver disponível no animal

description: The number of weaned piglets must be within the farm-configured range.
conditions: aplicado somente quando quantity estiver definido
validado contra os threshold_references configurados na granja (event_set: animal_weaning, type: quantity)

description: The average weight of the piglets is outside the permitted limits for this farm.
conditions: aplicado somente quando average_off_weight estiver definido
validado contra os threshold_references configurados na granja (event_set: animal_weaning, type: average_off_weight)

description: The weight of the sow is outside the permitted limits for this farm.
conditions: aplicado somente quando weight estiver definido
validado contra os threshold_references configurados na granja (event_set: animal_weaning, type: weight)

description: Cannot delete this weaning event if there are subsequent events for this animal.
It was not possible to obtain the total_piglets information from the nursing sow.
conditions: aplicado somente quando quantity estiver definido
disparado quando total_piglets não está disponível no animal

description: Average piglet age calculated from the average birth date must be within the configured farm thresholds.
conditions: aplicado somente quando date estiver definido
calculado como diferença em dias entre average_birth_date do animal e a data do evento
retorna falso se average_birth_date não estiver disponível
validado contra os threshold_references configurados na granja (event_set: animal_weaning, type: average_off_age, threshold_rule: no_rule)
